title: WorkItem
description: Canonical WorkItem schema. Source of truth for the PO Agent output and Architect Agent input. Any change here propagates to both.

issue.description: GitHub issue number this WorkItem was derived from

changeRequest.description: Clear description of what should change and why

acceptanceCriteria.description: Testable criteria that define done. Max 5 — more means the scope is too large.

criterion.description: What must be true for this criterion to be met

status.description: Set to 'pending' by PO Agent. Updated to 'met' or 'failed' by Developer Agent.

evidence.description: Test name proving the criterion is met. Set by Developer Agent, null until then.

scopeBoundary.description: Explicit statement of what is in scope. Developer Agent enforces this during implementation.

affectedAreas.description: Codebase paths likely to be affected

outOfScope.description: Explicitly excluded items to prevent scope creep

decisionLog.description: Key decisions made during PO refinement with rationale
